title: AstroAI Tyre Inflator Air Compressor 12V DC, Digital Car Tyre Pump 150 PSI, Preset Tyre Pressure & Auto Shutoff, Electric Air Pump for Car Tyres, Bicycles, Other Inflatables (Black&Yellow)
features: Digital Screen, Real-Time Pressure Display: The large digital screen displays the tyre's real-time pressure for a more accurate and intuitive experience. Avoids pressure reading errors common with dial tyre pumps.

Preset Tyre Pressure & Auto Shutoff: This tyre inflator will automatically shut off once it reaches the preset value, no need to babysit the inflation process and worry about overinflation. To inflate: just start the engine, insert the cigarette lighter plug into the car's 12 V outlet, connect the tyre, and preset the desired pressure by pressing "+" and "-".
Instant Inflation: For tyres with the specification of 185/55 R14, this car tyre pump can inflate from 30 PSI to 36 PSI ＜ 1 min, and can fully inflate a tyre from 0 PSI to 36 PSI ＜ 5 mins.

Ultra-Long Power Cord & Emergency LED Light: With a 0.48 m long air hose and a 3 m long power cord, the car tyre inflator is easily connected to any tyre. The integrated LED light is great for emergencies and working in dark environments. When the digital tyre inflator is powered, the LED light will illuminate.

Full Accessory Kit for All Inflation Needs: The package includes: 1×AstroAI S1 Tyre Inflator, 2×Nozzles, 1×Needle Valve Adapter, 1×Presta-Schrader Adapter, 1×Replacement Fuse, 1×User Manual. This tyre inflator air compressor is universally compatible with cars, bicycles, basketballs, swimming rings, and more. If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page What should I do if the tyre inflator will not work properly ---Improper Operation Ensure the plug is properly connected to the car's 12V cigarette lighter socket. Ensure the preset tyre pressure is higher than the current tyre pressure. Set the Desire Pressure first and then press ‘I’ to activate the air pump. What should I do if the tyre inflator will not work properly ---Fuse not work Check the vehicle cigarette lighter fuse, it should be rated at 15 A. Check if the fuse is blown. Ensure the in-line fuse is secure and inserted correctly; A replacement fuse is included in the package. What should I do if the tyre inflator will not work properly ---Slow inflation The inflation nozzle is not properly connected to the tyres’ valve stem. Excessive use will slow the inflation rate of the tire inflator. Let it cool for at least 10 minutes. User Manual And Suppport are always stand-by Pages 3-6 of the user manual have listed Precautions, Product Usage Steps, FAQ to help users to operate better. Please read carefully before use. Note: This product cannot be powered by USB ports! The product does not contain a battery and is powered by a 12V car cigarette lighter. It needs to be connected to the car cigarette lighter for use. This product cannot be powered by USB ports.
